name: code-review
description: A gates-heavy PR review. Reads a diff, branches on security exposure, then runs strict coverage and style gates before writing the review.

steps.instruction:
Read the full diff for PR #{pr_number}. Summarize intent, surface area,
and the riskiest changed files.
steps.title: Read Pr

steps.instruction:
Decide whether this PR touches authentication, authorization, secrets,
input handling, or anything network-facing.
steps.title: Touches Security

steps.instruction:
Audit the changed files against the OWASP top 10. Flag injection,
auth bypass, leaked secrets, and unsafe deserialization with file:line.
steps.title: Security Audit

steps.instruction: Verify the PR includes tests for its new behavior and that the suite passes.
steps.title: Coverage Check

steps.instruction: Check the diff against the project's style and conventions.
steps.title: Style Check

steps.instruction:
Write the review for PR #{pr_number}: a verdict (approve / request changes),
grouped findings, and the single most important thing to fix first.
steps.title: Write Review
